channel.title: c++ on Layle's Lair
channel.description: Recent content in c++ on Layle's Lair

item.title: RACEAC: Breaking Dead by Daylight's Integrity Checks
item.description: In an attempt to stop people from cheating by modifying game files, Dead by Daylight received an update that introduced integrity checks for the pak files/assets. Cheating was no longer possible. Unless…?

item.title: Instrumenting Binaries using revng and LLVM
item.description: One of the first things I ever wanted to implement was an import hooking library that placed the hooks by rewriting the calls statically instead of hooking the functions in-memory.

item.title: LLVM with CMake: It's easier than you'd think!
item.description: Have you ever wondered how you can set up LLVM using CMake? It’s actually easier than you might think. All thanks to an amazing fork of a project called hunter.
